name: J&P Check Cashing - East Chicago
description_short: Order Express is a multi-service financial company offering check cashing, money transfers, money orders, bill payments, and currency exchange across 25 states with 70+ branches.
description_long:
Order Express Inc. was founded in 1993 as a Mexican-owned company operating under U.S. law, beginning with a single Chicago branch to serve the Latino immigrant community. The company has since expanded to 25 regulated states with over 70 company-owned branches and authorized agents, maintaining its core focus on providing accessible financial services to underserved populations. The East Chicago location at 3645 E 106th St is one of their Illinois branches and is part of their broader network.

The East Chicago branch offers a comprehensive suite of financial services beyond basic check cashing. Available services include check cashing, money transfers, money orders, bill payment, currency exchange, phone top-ups, bus passes, plane ticket sales, Bitcoin ATM kiosks, courier services, vehicle services (renewals and plates), and insurance products. The branch operates extended hours (9 AM-7 PM Monday-Friday, 9 AM-5 PM Saturday, 9 AM-4 PM Sunday) to accommodate working customers and offers bilingual service in English and Spanish.

Order Express differentiates itself through multilingual customer service, extended operating hours, a broad service portfolio beyond traditional check cashing, and a loyalty program for repeat customers. The company maintains a strong online presence and customer review rating of 4.6 stars on Google, with customer feedback highlighting helpful staff and service quality. The focus on serving Latino communities and providing Spanish-language services positions them distinctly within their market.

As a check-cashing service, Order Express is best suited for individuals needing quick cash access without bank accounts, money transfer capabilities, and bundled financial services. The main limitation is that this remains a non-bank financial services provider without credit products, lending capabilities, or traditional banking services. Customers should be aware that check cashing typically involves fees and is not a substitute for banking relationships.
pros: Extended hours (9 AM-7 PM weekdays, weekend availability) accommodate working customers
Bilingual English/Spanish service addressing Latino community needs
Multi-service platform combines check cashing with money transfers, bill payment, currency exchange, and courier services
4.6-star Google rating with documented customer praise for staff helpfulness and service quality
Loyalty program for repeat customers provides incentive for ongoing business
Bitcoin ATM kiosks available, offering cryptocurrency access
Established 30+ years (founded 1993) with regulated operations across 25 states
cons: Check cashing services typically involve fees not disclosed on the website
No credit products, lending, or traditional banking services available
Limited financial information transparency—no fee schedule, exchange rates, or service charges posted online
Not a federally insured banking institution, lacking FDIC protection
Services focus on unbanked/underbanked populations rather than comprehensive financial management
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals needing immediate check cashing without bank accounts
Latino immigrants and Spanish-speaking customers seeking bilingual financial services
Customers needing bundled services (check cashing + money transfer + bill payment) in one location
People requiring extended-hours financial services outside traditional bank operating times
diagnosis: Order Express East Chicago is ideal for unbanked or underbanked customers needing quick check cashing, money transfers, or bill payments with extended hours and bilingual service. The main caveat is that check-cashing services involve fees, this is not a bank, and it does not offer credit products, lending, or comprehensive financial planning tools.
